programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Jefferson County, a traffic stop turns dangerous; in Tulsa, officers pull over a suspected stolen vehicle; in Missoula, police search for a rider on horseback accused of rustling cattle.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In El Paso, police engage in a struggle with a suspect who reportedly attempts to flee; in Mission, officers respond to a serious car accident; in Greene County, a man believed to be an escaped convict leads police on a wild pursuit.
